mapper.select: select pi.id as portfolio_item_id, pi.user_id, pi.stock_id, coalesce(s.name_ko, s.name_en) as company_name, s.ticker, s.finnhub_symbol, s.logo_url, s.asset_type, s.sector, s.industry, pi.daily_invest_amount, pi.holding_quantity, pi.investment_start_date, pi.memo, u.risk_profile, u.investment_dna_type from portfolio_items pi join users u on u.id = pi.user_id join stocks s on s.id = pi.stock_id where pi.user_id = #{userId} and pi.is_active = true order by pi.updated_at desc, pi.created_at desc

select distinct on (pi.stock_id) null as portfolio_item_id, pi.user_id, pi.stock_id, coalesce(s.name_ko, s.name_en) as company_name, s.ticker, s.finnhub_symbol, s.logo_url, s.asset_type, s.sector, s.industry, pi.daily_invest_amount, pi.holding_quantity, pi.investment_start_date, pi.memo, u.risk_profile, u.investment_dna_type from portfolio_items pi join users u on u.id = pi.user_id join stocks s on s.id = pi.stock_id where pi.is_active = true and u.status = 'ACTIVE' order by pi.stock_id, pi.updated_at desc, pi.created_at desc

select pi.id as portfolio_item_id, pi.user_id, pi.stock_id, coalesce(s.name_ko, s.name_en) as company_name, s.ticker, s.finnhub_symbol, s.logo_url, s.asset_type, s.sector, s.industry, pi.daily_invest_amount, pi.holding_quantity, pi.investment_start_date, pi.memo, u.risk_profile, u.investment_dna_type from portfolio_items pi join users u on u.id = pi.user_id join stocks s on s.id = pi.stock_id where pi.user_id = #{userId} and pi.id = #{portfolioItemId} and pi.is_active = true limit 1

select pi.id as portfolio_item_id, pi.user_id, pi.stock_id, coalesce(s.name_ko, s.name_en) as company_name, s.ticker, s.finnhub_symbol, s.logo_url, s.asset_type, s.sector, s.industry, pi.daily_invest_amount, pi.holding_quantity, pi.investment_start_date, pi.memo, u.risk_profile, u.investment_dna_type from portfolio_items pi join users u on u.id = pi.user_id join stocks s on s.id = pi.stock_id where pi.user_id = #{userId} and pi.stock_id = #{stockId} and pi.is_active = true order by pi.updated_at desc, pi.created_at desc limit 1

insert into recommendations ( user_id, portfolio_item_id, recommendation_date, recommendation_status, engine_score, confidence_score, current_amount, recommended_amount, final_note, engine_version, formula_version, raw_score, risk_adjustment, price_score, news_score, price_weight, news_weight, price_return_30d, news_sentiment_score, price_momentum_score, price_stability_score, fundamental_quality_score, user_fit_score, cross_factor_adjustment, user_adjustment, risk_profile_applied, confidence_breakdown_json, increase_eligible ) values ( #{command.userId}, #{command.portfolioItemId}, #{command.recommendationDate}, #{command.recommendationStatus}, #{command.engineScore}, #{command.confidenceScore}, #{command.currentAmount}, #{command.recommendedAmount}, #{command.finalNote}, #{command.engineVersion}, #{command.formulaVersion}, #{command.rawScore}, #{command.riskAdjustment}, #{command.priceScore}, #{command.newsScore}, #{command.priceWeight}, #{command.newsWeight}, #{command.priceReturn30d}, #{command.newsSentimentScore}, #{command.priceMomentumScore}, #{command.priceStabilityScore}, #{command.fundamentalQualityScore}, #{command.userFitScore}, #{command.crossFactorAdjustment}, #{command.userAdjustment}, #{command.riskProfileApplied}, cast(#{command.confidenceBreakdownJson} as jsonb), #{command.increaseEligible} ) on conflict (portfolio_item_id, recommendation_date) do update set recommendation_status = excluded.recommendation_status, engine_score = excluded.engine_score, confidence_score = excluded.confidence_score, current_amount = excluded.current_amount, recommended_amount = excluded.recommended_amount, final_note = excluded.final_note, engine_version = excluded.engine_version, formula_version = excluded.formula_version, raw_score = excluded.raw_score, risk_adjustment = excluded.risk_adjustment, price_score = excluded.price_score, news_score = excluded.news_score, price_weight = excluded.price_weight, news_weight = excluded.news_weight, price_return_30d = excluded.price_return_30d, news_sentiment_score = excluded.news_sentiment_score, price_momentum_score = excluded.price_momentum_score, price_stability_score = excluded.price_stability_score, fundamental_quality_score = excluded.fundamental_quality_score, user_fit_score = excluded.user_fit_score, cross_factor_adjustment = excluded.cross_factor_adjustment, user_adjustment = excluded.user_adjustment, risk_profile_applied = excluded.risk_profile_applied, confidence_breakdown_json = excluded.confidence_breakdown_json, increase_eligible = excluded.increase_eligible returning id
mapper.insert: insert into recommendation_evidence ( recommendation_id, evidence_type, title, body, score_impact, display_order ) values ( #{command.recommendationId}, #{command.evidenceType}, #{command.title}, #{command.body}, #{command.scoreImpact}, #{command.displayOrder} )

insert into recommendation_factor_details ( recommendation_id, factor_code, factor_score, factor_weight, factor_summary, factor_raw_json ) values ( #{command.recommendationId}, #{command.factorCode}, #{command.factorScore}, #{command.factorWeight}, #{command.factorSummary}, cast(#{command.factorRawJson} as jsonb) ) on conflict (recommendation_id, factor_code) do update set factor_score = excluded.factor_score, factor_weight = excluded.factor_weight, factor_summary = excluded.factor_summary, factor_raw_json = excluded.factor_raw_json

insert into news_analysis_cache ( stock_id, news_id, symbol, news_published_at, headline, summary, source_name, news_url, sentiment_label, sentiment_score, keyword_score, relevance_score, impact_level, reason, recency_weight, impact_weight, weighted_score, content_hash, analysis_batch_hash, llm_model, analyzed_at ) values ( #{command.stockId}, #{command.newsId}, #{command.symbol}, #{command.newsPublishedAt}, #{command.headline}, #{command.summary}, #{command.sourceName}, #{command.newsUrl}, #{command.sentimentLabel}, #{command.sentimentScore}, #{command.keywordScore}, #{command.relevanceScore}, #{command.impactLevel}, #{command.reason}, #{command.recencyWeight}, #{command.impactWeight}, #{command.weightedScore}, #{command.contentHash}, #{command.analysisBatchHash}, #{command.llmModel}, #{command.analyzedAt} ) on conflict (stock_id, content_hash) do update set sentiment_label = excluded.sentiment_label, sentiment_score = excluded.sentiment_score, keyword_score = excluded.keyword_score, relevance_score = excluded.relevance_score, impact_level = excluded.impact_level, reason = excluded.reason, recency_weight = excluded.recency_weight, impact_weight = excluded.impact_weight, weighted_score = excluded.weighted_score, analysis_batch_hash = excluded.analysis_batch_hash, llm_model = excluded.llm_model, analyzed_at = excluded.analyzed_at
mapper.select: select distinct on (r.portfolio_item_id) r.id as recommendation_id, r.recommendation_date, r.portfolio_item_id, pi.stock_id, coalesce(s.name_ko, s.name_en) as company_name, s.ticker, s.logo_url, s.asset_type, r.recommendation_status, r.engine_score, r.confidence_score, r.current_amount, r.recommended_amount, r.final_note, r.engine_version, r.created_at, r.formula_version, r.raw_score, r.risk_adjustment, r.price_score, r.news_score, r.price_weight, r.news_weight, r.price_return_30d, r.news_sentiment_score, r.price_momentum_score, r.price_stability_score, r.fundamental_quality_score, r.user_fit_score, r.cross_factor_adjustment, r.user_adjustment, r.risk_profile_applied, cast(r.confidence_breakdown_json as text) as confidence_breakdown_json, r.increase_eligible, pi.holding_quantity, pi.investment_start_date, pi.memo from recommendations r join portfolio_items pi on pi.id = r.portfolio_item_id join stocks s on s.id = pi.stock_id where r.user_id = #{userId} and pi.is_active = true order by r.portfolio_item_id, r.recommendation_date desc, r.created_at desc

select r.id as recommendation_id, r.recommendation_date, r.portfolio_item_id, pi.stock_id, coalesce(s.name_ko, s.name_en) as company_name, s.ticker, s.logo_url, s.asset_type, r.recommendation_status, r.engine_score, r.confidence_score, r.current_amount, r.recommended_amount, r.final_note, r.engine_version, r.created_at, r.formula_version, r.raw_score, r.risk_adjustment, r.price_score, r.news_score, r.price_weight, r.news_weight, r.price_return_30d, r.news_sentiment_score, r.price_momentum_score, r.price_stability_score, r.fundamental_quality_score, r.user_fit_score, r.cross_factor_adjustment, r.user_adjustment, r.risk_profile_applied, cast(r.confidence_breakdown_json as text) as confidence_breakdown_json, r.increase_eligible, pi.holding_quantity, pi.investment_start_date, pi.memo from recommendations r join portfolio_items pi on pi.id = r.portfolio_item_id join stocks s on s.id = pi.stock_id where r.user_id = #{userId} and r.portfolio_item_id = #{portfolioItemId} and pi.is_active = true order by r.recommendation_date desc, r.created_at desc limit 1
select recommendation_id, evidence_type, title, body, score_impact, display_order from recommendation_evidence where recommendation_id = #{recommendationId} order by display_order asc, id asc

select r.id as recommendation_id, r.recommendation_date, r.created_at as generated_at, r.recommendation_status, r.engine_score, r.final_note, core_factor.factor_code as core_factor_code, core_factor.factor_summary as core_factor_summary from recommendations r join portfolio_items pi on pi.id = r.portfolio_item_id left join lateral ( select details.factor_code, details.factor_summary from recommendation_factor_details details where details.recommendation_id = r.id order by abs(coalesce(details.factor_score, 50) - 50) * greatest(coalesce(details.factor_weight, 1), 1) desc, details.id desc limit 1 ) core_factor on true where r.user_id = #{userId} and r.portfolio_item_id = #{portfolioItemId} and pi.is_active = true order by r.recommendation_date desc, r.created_at desc limit #{limit}

select deduplicated.recommendation_id, deduplicated.factor_code, deduplicated.factor_score, deduplicated.factor_weight, deduplicated.factor_summary, cast(deduplicated.factor_raw_json as text) as factor_raw_json from ( select recommendation_id, factor_code, factor_score, factor_weight, factor_summary, factor_raw_json, id, row_number() over ( partition by recommendation_id, factor_code order by id desc ) as row_number from recommendation_factor_details where recommendation_id = #{recommendationId} ) deduplicated where deduplicated.row_number = 1 order by deduplicated.id asc

select stock_id, news_id, symbol, news_published_at, headline, summary, source_name, news_url, sentiment_label, sentiment_score, keyword_score, relevance_score, impact_level, reason, recency_weight, impact_weight, weighted_score, content_hash, analysis_batch_hash, llm_model, analyzed_at from news_analysis_cache where stock_id = #{stockId} and relevance_score >= 60 and (news_published_at at time zone 'Asia/Seoul')::date <= (current_timestamp at time zone 'Asia/Seoul')::date order by news_published_at desc nulls last, abs(weighted_score) desc nulls last limit 12
